intent_head: Who has the next upcoming birthday? If there is a tie on the date, include every matching person. Answer with exact names only, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering 99_system and 10_entities/cast, and used canonical cast record for exact name/birthday.
function.outcome_justification: From context date 2026-03-02, cast birthday search showed the earliest upcoming month-day as 04-04. Canonical file 10_entities/cast/petra.md confirms the exact name 'Petra Novak' with birthday 1988-04-04. A targeted tie-check search for 04-04 found only petra.md.
